prerequisites.value: Caster level 7th, lawful alignment, worship of the associated deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** You are able to modify more of your spells to use as counterspells. The DC of the Spellcraft check you must succeed at to identify an opponentâs spell is equal to 20 + the spell level of the opponentâs spell (instead of 15 + the spell level), but you are able to cast as your counterspell any spell from the same school of the foeâs spell (instead of the same spell). The level of the spell used to counterspell must be of a level equal to or higher than your foeâs spell.
